title: Sheet
description: A panel that slides in from the edge of the screen.

manual.title: Install dependencies
manual.description: Install the required dependencies for the sheet component.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

usage.import: import { Sheet, SheetContent, SheetDescription, SheetHeader, SheetTitle, SheetTrigger } from '@repo/components';

examples.title: Default (Right)
examples.description: Default sheet slides in from the right.
examples.code:
import { Button, Sheet, SheetContent, SheetDescription, SheetFooter, SheetHeader, SheetTitle, SheetTrigger, } from "@repo/components"; export default function SheetDemo() { return (
Edit profile Right side default panel.
); }

examples.title: Left
examples.description: Sheet slides in from the left. Useful for navigation or filters.
examples.code:
import { Button, Sheet, SheetContent, SheetDescription, SheetHeader, SheetTitle, SheetTrigger, SheetFooter } from "@repo/components"; export default function SheetLeft() { return (
Filters Left side variant.
) }

examples.title: Top
examples.description: Sheet slides in from the top. Useful for announcements or banners.
examples.code:
import { Button, Sheet, SheetContent, SheetDescription, SheetHeader, SheetTitle, SheetTrigger, SheetFooter } from "@repo/components"; export default function SheetTop() { return (
Announcements Top slide-in variant.
) }

examples.title: Bottom
examples.description: Sheet slides in from the bottom. Great for mobile action sheets.
examples.code:
import { Button, Sheet, SheetContent, SheetDescription, SheetFooter, SheetHeader, SheetTitle, SheetTrigger, } from "@repo/components"; export default function SheetBottom() { return (
Quick actions Bottom sheet variant.
) }
